label: Airframes.io Flow
info:
ACARS stream processor.

Requirements:
  cd ~/.node-red && npm install @airframes/acars-decoder
  settings.js -> functionExternalModules: true

Static assets (dashboard.css + dashboard.js) must be placed at:
  /mnt/ssl/static/dashboard.css
  /mnt/ssl/static/dashboard.js

Or adjust the file-in paths in the airframes-css-read / airframes-js-read nodes.

FIX: Sub-decoders (libacars, acars-decoder, api) NO longer write directly to
the JSONL file. Instead they call 'airframes-merge-and-persist' which deep-merges
all enrichment fields onto the base record and appends a SINGLE updated line.
The events reader merges all lines sharing the same key so no enrichment is lost.

name: Normalize, cache and route
acars-decoder-typescript decode
Auto-fetch airframes API on arrival
Enrich event with API data & persist
Merge enrichment & append to JSONL
Build events JSON
Build ACARS stats
